From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Politics of a province of China

The **politics of Anhui** Province in the [People's Republic of China](/wiki/People%27s_Republic_of_China "People's Republic of China") is structured in a dual party-government system like all other governing institutions in mainland China.

The Governor of [Anhui](/wiki/Anhui "Anhui") (安徽省省长) is the highest-ranking official in the People's Government of Anhui. However, in the province's dual party-government governing system, the Governor has less power than the Anhui [Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party "Chinese Communist Party") Provincial Committee Secretary (安徽省委书记), colloquially termed the "Anhui Party Chief".
